summary: Completed comprehensive testing of About Us, Contact Us, Contribute pages, Contributions Manager (admin approval/rejection workflow), Login page cleanup, and Footer Quick Links cleanup. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

backend.contact_submit_success: PASS - POST /api/contact returns 200 with success message
backend.contribution_submit_validation: PASS - Missing contributor info or steps returns 400
backend.login_success: PASS - POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns access_token
backend.login_invalid_credentials: PASS - POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401

frontend.about_page_sections: PASS - Mission, What We Offer, Community Driven, Values sections all visible
frontend.contact_form_fields: PASS - Name, Email, Subject, Message fields with data-testid present
frontend.contact_form_submission: PASS - Form submits successfully, shows 'Message Sent!' toast
frontend.contribute_page_loads: PASS - /contribute page displays 'Contribute an Article' title
frontend.contribute_form_fields: PASS - Contributor name/email, article title/description/category/difficulty/tags, steps with data-testid present
frontend.contribute_admin_notice: PASS - Shows 'Submitted articles will be reviewed by admin' notice
frontend.login_no_default_credentials: PASS - Login page does NOT show 'Default Credentials' text (removed as expected)
frontend.footer_quick_links_about: PASS - Footer Quick Links has 'About Us' link
frontend.footer_quick_links_contact: PASS - Footer Quick Links has 'Contact Us' link
frontend.footer_quick_links_contribute: PASS - Footer Quick Links has 'Contribute' link
frontend.footer_no_admin_panel: PASS - Footer Quick Links does NOT have 'Admin Panel' link (removed as expected)
frontend.admin_panel_contributions_card: PASS - Admin Panel has Contributions card with 'Review articles' description
frontend.contributions_manager_loads: PASS - /admin/contributions page loads with Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs
frontend.contributions_manager_pending_tab: PASS - Pending tab shows contributions with approve/reject buttons
frontend.contributions_manager_preview: PASS - Preview button expands contribution showing step details and code
frontend.contributions_manager_tabs_switching: PASS - Approved/Rejected tabs show respective contributions

seed_data_creation: Test contributions created during testing: TEST_Contribution_* (multiple), TEST_Approve_*, TEST_Reject_*. Contact messages created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: About/Contact/Contribute features fully implemented and tested. About page: /about with mission/offerings/community/values sections. Contact page: /contact with form (name/email/subject/message), POST /api/contact stores in contact_messages collection. Contribute page: /contribute with full article submission form, POST /api/contributions/submit creates pending contribution. Contributions Manager: /admin/contributions shows pending/approved/rejected tabs, approve/reject buttons create articles or mark rejected. Login page no longer shows default credentials. Footer Quick Links updated: Home, About Us, Contact Us, Contribute (no Admin Panel). Header nav has Contribute link. All features have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
